title: Process Flow for waitpid() System Call
description: Illustrates the interaction between a parent process and its child processes when using the waitpid() function to wait for a specific child's state change.
relationships: Parent calls waitpid(PID_1234, &status, options) to wait for a specific child
Kernel suspends parent until target child (PID 1234) changes state (e.g., terminates)
Child Process 1 terminates and becomes a zombie
Kernel provides exit status to parent via waitpid() return
Parent reaps the child, removing it from the process table
